Blockers (2018)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $60,311,495Details
International Box Office $34,212,286
Worldwide Box Office $94,523,781
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $4,766,742
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $4,412,582
Total $9,179,324
Further financial details...

Synopsis

When three parents discover their daughters’ pact to lose their virginity at prom, they launch a covert one-night operation to stop the teens from sealing the deal.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$20,556,350 (34.1% of total gross)
Legs:2.93 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:63.8% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$21,000,000 (worldwide box office is 4.5 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,379 opening theaters/3,418 max. theaters, 4.7 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $79,179,530

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: April 6th, 2018 (Wide) by Universal
International Releases: March 29th, 2018 (Wide) (Slovenia)
March 30th, 2018 (Wide) (United Kingdom)
March 30th, 2018 (Wide) (Australia)
March 30th, 2018 (Wide) (New Zealand)
April 5th, 2018 (Wide) (Ukraine)
Video Release: June 19th, 2018 by Universal Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: R for crude and sexual content, and language throughout, drug content, teen partying, and some graphic nudity
(Rating bulletin 2512 (Cert #51444), 1/31/2018)
Running Time: 102 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Epilogue, Prologue, Same Role, Multiple Actors, Scene in End Credits
Plot point: Closeted Homosexual, Coming Out, Dysfunctional Family, Empty Nest, Interracial Romance, LGBTQ+, Loss Of Virginity, Single Parent
Social setting: Graduation, High School, Prom
Subgenre: Teenage Sex Comedy
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Comedy
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Point Grey, Good Universe, Hurwitz & Schlossberg Productions, Universal Pictures, DMG Entertainment
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
